summary: Official repo-owned OpenClaw skill line for OpenUI MCP Studio. It includes install/proof notes and supporting artifacts without claiming that a ClawHub listing is already live.
discoverySurface: Official OpenClaw surfaces now expose ClawHub as a public skill registry. This repo therefore promotes OpenClaw from bridge-only language to an official repo-owned skill line, while still refusing to claim a live listing before publication.

artifacts.role: human-readable OpenClaw install and proof note
generic stdio MCP launch contract for OpenClaw-style local hosts
repo-owned starter-pack artifact for skill registry submissions

installPath: Use examples/public-distribution/troubleshooting.md if the host expects a different launch wrapper
notFor: claiming a verified OpenClaw runtime inside another host
claiming operator-owned publication or review has already completed
operatorOnlyTail: Create or submit the actual ClawHub registry entry
Complete any platform review or account-owned publish step
Re-run fresh verification after publication before claiming the listing is live
